J1N J1N_UNSTEADY_GAIT (J1N) Unsteady Gait CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - other - unsteady gait in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
354 J1O J1O_VOMIT (J1O) Vomiting CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - other - vomiting in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
355 J1P J1P_NONE_ABOVE (J1P) None of Above Problem Conditions CHAR 1 Health conditions: problem conditions - other - none of above in last 7 days. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
356 J2A
